name: rad-context-prompter
description: Production-grade prompt engineering toolkit. Systematic tool-specific routing across 30+ AI platforms, 35 anti-pattern diagnostic reference, 12 technique selection matrix, context engineering for agentic systems, prompt decompilation/reverse-engineering, and autonomous prompt debugging. Covers Claude, GPT, Gemini, o3, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Cursor, Claude Code, n8n, and more.
